headline: How Analyst Upgrades Amid Softer Revenue Trends At W.W. Grainger (GWW) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent months, several leading analysts, including those from Morgan Stanley, JP Morgan, and Oppenheimer, have raised their ratings on W.W. Grainger, even as the company reported slower revenue growth than some industry peers. This combination of more cautious recent performance and upgraded analyst views highlights a tension between short-term operational pressure and longer-term confidence in the business. Against this backdrop of higher analyst confidence despite softer recent revenue...

headline: Why Is W.W. Grainger (GWW) Down 3.9% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: W.W. Grainger (GWW) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
